body.title: Git subtree: merge wild_igor/igor/ history into devices/igor/
body.result: devices/igor/ merged with 1188 history commits; tests/igor/ in place; 937 UU tests pass; conftest autouse fixtures updated to devices.igor.*
body.description:
Use git filter-repo on a clone of TheIgors to extract wild_igor/igor/ with its full commit history, remapping to the devices/igor/ prefix, then add the filtered history as a remote in UnseenUniversity and merge it in. Also move TheIgors/tests/ → UnseenUniversity/tests/igor/. Igor must be stopped (tmux send-keys to session 'igor') before this step begins. Do NOT delete wild_igor/ from TheIgors yet — that is T-igor-theigers-archive.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/ (all new files from wild_igor/igor/), tests/igor/ (new, from TheIgors/tests/), .git history in UnseenUniversity
**Design rules:** git history preserved via filter-repo + merge, not squash; no new cross-device imports; devices.igor.* is the canonical package prefix going forward
**Scope boundary:** In scope: physical file move with history into devices/igor/, test directory move. Out of scope: updating any import statements (that is T-igor-import-rewrite). Do not touch TheIgors/wild_igor/ source files.
**Test plan:** After merge: `python -c "import devices.igor"` succeeds from UnseenUniversity root. `ls devices/igor/cognition/ devices/igor/brainstem/ devices/igor/tools/` all exist. `git log --oneline devices/igor/ | wc -l` shows more than 1 commit (history preserved). Existing UU test suite (`pytest tests/ -x -q`) still passes.
